2.7.8 Best Practices in De-bugging
agentic.excerpt:
Perform Debugging Steps (Isolate and Identify Root Cause)
Reproduce the issue:
Simulate the user flow where the issue was observed (e.g., checkout with loyalty, login failure, order sync).
If you can’t reproduce, gather as much contextual info (time, terminal ID, store, error screenshot) as possible

llm_prompt.title: Recover from tinycore prompt
llm_prompt.excerpt:
Connect a keyboard
type below and press enter
tce-load -wi openssh
sudo cp /usr/local/ssh/sshd_config.orig /usr/local/ssh/sshd_config
sudo /usr/local/etc/init.d/openssh start
sudo passwd tc ( use abc123 as password)
Now we can ssh from another device on the same neywork and recover the pos
ssh tc@10
